phoneticUs: 藞pl忙st蓹藢s蓱藧l; 藞pl忙st蓹藢so蕣l
meaning: n.濉戞枡婧惰兌,澧炲婧惰兌
examples: We are the first indigenous manufacturer of Plastisol Inks in India.
Plastisol inks (both solvent and water based) are used in textile screen printing.
Plastisol inks are 100% solid, solvent less, smell free and screen printers friendly.
